name: World of Bugs RPG
description:
You are a bug! Will you choose to be an insect, or an arachnid? (or myriapods, or crustaceans)

You can be a king, queen… or anything, really — as long as it’s some type of bug.

P.S., Insects and arachnids hate eachother. They are enemies, and very warlike with eachother.

In case you guys get confused, a myriapod is something like a centipede or millipede, and a crustacean is like a shrimp or lobster. And yes, crustaceans are considered to be “bugs”.

This world is called Thalaxis, to be in particularrrrr…

Heres another image of this planet (from a tiny bug like yours perspective):

Ideas for what you can be:

-Bee

-Cockroach

-Ant

-Spider

-Scorpion

-Centipede

-Shrimp

-Mosquito

-Moth

-Catterpillar

-…nevermind. Instead, I’m going to give you this short list of what ChatGPT has for ideas:

1. Beetles (Coleoptera)

- Ladybug (Coccinellidae)

- Stag beetle (Lucanidae)

- Weevil (Curculionidae)

2. Butterflies and Moths (Lepidoptera)

- Monarch butterfly (Danaus plexippus)

- Luna moth (Actias luna)

- Cabbage white (Pieris rapae)

3. True Bugs (Hemiptera)

- Aphid (Aphidoidea)

- Cicada (Cicadidae)

- Assassin bug (Reduviidae)

4. Ants, Bees, and Wasps (Hymenoptera)

- Honeybee (Apis mellifera)

- Carpenter ant (Camponotus)

- Yellowjacket (Vespula)

5. Flies (Diptera)

- Housefly (Musca domestica)

- Mosquito (Culicidae)

- Fruit fly (Drosophila melanogaster)

6. Grasshoppers and Crickets (Orthoptera)

- Field cricket (Gryllus)

- Locust (Locustinae)

- Katydid (Tettigoniidae)

7. Dragonflies and Damselflies (Odonata)

- Common dragonfly (Anisoptera)

- Blue damselfly (Zygoptera)

8. Termites (Isoptera)

- Subterranean termite (Rhinotermitidae)

- Drywood termite (Kalotermitidae)

9. Cockroaches (Blattodea)

- American cockroach (Periplaneta americana)

- German cockroach (Blattella germanica)

10. Mantises (Mantodea)

- Praying mantis (Mantidae)

- Chinese mantis (Tenodera sinensis)

11. Earwigs (Dermaptera)

- Common earwig (Forficula auricularia)

12. Stick Insects (Phasmatodea)

- Indian stick insect (Carausius morosus)

13. Fleas (Siphonaptera)

- Cat flea (Ctenocephalides felis)

- Dog flea (Ctenocephalides canis)

14. Lice (Phthiraptera)

- Human head louse (Pediculus humanus capitis)

- Body louse (Pediculus humanus corporis)

15. Mayflies (Ephemeroptera)

- Common mayfly (Ephemeridae)

These are just a few examples from the immense diversity of insect life. Each of these groups contains numerous species with their own unique characteristics.

You don’t even have to be a bug from this list. You can be any type of bug in the world.

Bug of the day: Giraffe Weevil.
creator: Weezer.
